name: Widow who recently remarried
description: PM Matru Vandana says 'first live birth' — does marital history reset upon remarriage?

pm_matru_vandana.note: Is she entitled to PM Matru Vandana for first child of current marriage, or is prior child disqualifying?

test_focus: AMBIGUITY — Scheme rules don't clarify how remarriage affects 'first live birth' criterion

name: Farmer who leases land, not owns
description: PM Kisan says 'land holding farmers' but ambiguous whether leased/mortgaged land counts.

pm_kisan.note: Hard rule: land_owned_acres > 0 fails. Leased land status unknown.

test_focus: HARD FAILURE — Land ownership defined as owned, not leased. Shows why gap analysis matters.

name: Has Aadhaar but no bank account
description: PM Kisan, PM Jan Dhan require both. Does one without the other exclude the user?

pm_jan_dhan.note: This scheme opens the bank account!

test_focus: PREREQUISITE DEPENDENCY — PM Jan Dhan enables access to other schemes

name: Street vendor without pre-COVID certificate
description: SVANidhi requires pre-COVID street vending certificate. What if lost or never had?

svaniidhi.note: Hard rule: covid_vending_cert == false blocks eligibility

test_focus: DOCUMENTATION BARRIER — Certificate requirement creates artificial exclusion despite actual street vending history

name: 17-year-old student
description: NSP requires age restrictions; other schemes might cover via education support.

nsp.note: Age < 18 disqualifies from National Scholarship Scheme

pm_poshan.note: Age 6-14 criterion met if in eligible school

test_focus: AGE CUTOFF — Different schemes have overlapping but distinct age boundaries

name: SC woman running a business
description: Stand-Up India targets SC/ST + women. Double eligibility — does one satisfy or do both conditions apply?

stand_up_india.note: SC + woman = multiple eligibility pathways (likely 'or' logic, not 'and')

test_focus: ELIGIBILITY INTERSECTION — Clarify if multiple criteria are AND or OR logic

name: Migrant worker registered in Bihar, lives in Maharashtra
description: MGNREGA is state-specific. Rural residency definition unclear for migrants.

mgnrega.note: Which state's residency rules apply? MGNREGA enrollment by state, but migrant status unclear.

test_focus: STATE JURISDICTION — Scheme implementation varies by state; no unified rule for migrants

name: BPL family with one member in government service
description: PM Kisan excludes govt employees. Does one member's govt job exclude entire family?

pm_kisan.note: Is govt employee criterion evaluated at applicant level or family level?

test_focus: FAMILY-LEVEL RULES — Unclear if exclusion applies to individual applicant or household

name: Person with disability, no caste certificate
description: Some schemes have disability provisions. Do they overlap with caste-based schemes?

stand_up_india.note: Requires SC/ST or woman; disability alone insufficient

test_focus: EXCLUSION — Disability doesn't substitute for caste-based eligibility

name: Joint family, only one son owns land
description: PM Kisan 'family' definition unclear: joint vs nuclear? Only owner eligible or all members?

pm_kisan.note: Does joint family share land ownership? Or only the legal owner can claim?

test_focus: AGGREGATION AMBIGUITY — Family-level resources vs individual-level eligibility
